Complete inventory of every NumPy operation and its mechestim status.

| `typename` | `me.typename` | `np.typename` | free | $0$ | 🟢 supported | Return description of given data type code. |
| `union1d` | `me.union1d` | `np.union1d` | free | $0$ | 🟢 supported | Unique union of two arrays. |
| `unique` | `me.unique` | `np.unique` | free | $0$ | 🟢 supported | Find unique elements of array. |
| `unique_all` | `me.unique_all` | `np.unique_all` | free | $0$ | 🟢 supported | Return unique values, indices, inverse, and counts (NumPy 2.x). |
| `unique_counts` | `me.unique_counts` | `np.unique_counts` | free | $0$ | 🟢 supported | Return unique values and their counts (NumPy 2.x). |
| `unique_inverse` | `me.unique_inverse` | `np.unique_inverse` | free | $0$ | 🟢 supported | Return unique values and inverse indices (NumPy 2.x). |
| `unique_values` | `me.unique_values` | `np.unique_values` | free | $0$ | 🟢 supported | Return unique values without extra info (NumPy 2.x). |
| `unpackbits` | `me.unpackbits` | `np.unpackbits` | free | $0$ | 🟢 supported | Unpack elements of array into bits. |
| `unravel_index` | `me.unravel_index` | `np.unravel_index` | free | $0$ | 🟢 supported | Convert flat index to multi-dimensional index. |
| `unstack` | `me.unstack` | `np.unstack` | free | $0$ | 🟢 supported | Unstack array along axis into tuple of arrays (NumPy 2.x). |
| `unwrap` | `me.unwrap` | `np.unwrap` | counted_custom | $\text{numel}(\text{input})$ | 🟠 supported | Phase unwrap. Cost: numel(input) (diff + conditional adjustment). |
| `vander` | `me.vander` | `np.vander` | free | $0$ | 🟢 supported | Generate Vandermonde matrix. |
| `var` | `me.var` | `np.var` | counted_reduction | $\text{numel}(\text{input})$ | 🟡 supported | Variance; cost_multiplier=2 (two passes). |
